title.en: Repair is up to standard, and the contribution ...

content.en:
Ye Tian applied to become an elite member of Tianfenghai, and the top management of Tianfenghai was immediately reviewed.

Repair is up to standard, and the contribution value is up to standard.

As a result, Ye Tian officially became an elite member of Tianfeng Sea, and the elite members surpassed ninety-nine percent of the members of Tianfeng Sea, and this level was considered the middle level of Tianfeng Sea.

After becoming an elite-level member of Tianfeng Hai, Ye Tian could indeed exchange for a treasure like the Void Mi Golden Fruit, but after a little questioning, he knew that the Void Mi Golden Fruit was out of stock now, and there were already tens of thousands of invincible people lining up to buy it in front of him, and even submitted a billion contribution points.

It can be seen from this that there are many invincible people who want to make up the golden fruit.

Therefore, Ye Tian dispelled the idea of obtaining the Void Golden Fruit through the Heavenly Wind Sea.

this day.

Ye Tian spent a lot of contribution points to buy a large number of precious materials, which were all used to block the Feather Heaven and Earth.

Blocking an exotic world and using it as their own back garden, many strong people are willing to do so, but the price is too great, not something that ordinary invincibles can afford, but fortunately, now Ye Tian has accumulated enough contribution points, so he can afford to buy these materials, and then use them to arrange the Void Source Array that blocks the Feathering Heaven and Earth.

Once the Void Source Array is arranged, even in the Source Sea, this exotic world will be hidden, and it will not be perceived unless you look at this exotic world up close.

But this probability is so low that it is almost impossible to detect.

Blocking an exotic world as their own base, this matter is also relatively common among the high-level of the Tianfeng Sea, so even if Ye Tian is discovered, no one will suspect anything, after all, an exotic world has little value, and it can't develop any good things, no one will doubt that an exotic world will give birth to an eternal source thing.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian gathered the materials of the Void Source Array that blocked the Feathering Heaven and Earth, and he left the Tianlin Realm with these materials, and transferred them again and again to ensure that no one followed him, and then came to the Feathering Heaven and Earth.

......

"Let's start decorating!"

Ye Tian melted countless materials, and began to refine one formation base after another according to the layout of the Void Source Array, integrating them into the territory of the Feather Heaven and Earth, and perfectly integrating the 108 array bases with the Feather Heaven and Earth.

It took hundreds of years and countless arrangements to complete Ye Tian's arrangement of the Void Source Array.

"Turn on!"

Ye Tian urged the Void Source Array.

In the next moment, countless origin powers poured into the Feather Heaven and Earth from the Source Sea, and merged into those formation bases to act as the ability of the Void Source Array, this is the awesomeness of the Void Source Array, which can use the energy of the Source Sea.

It was precisely because of this that the Void Source Array could block the Exotic World.

In addition, the Void Source Array can isolate the blockade, and even an incomparably powerful invincible cannot enter the Void Source Array through the coordinates tearing it in.

Moreover, as long as Ye Tian is willing, he can even slowly move the exotic world and change the coordinates.

Time passed slowly, and finally the Void Source Array was running for eternity, as long as the Source Sea did not dry up, the Void Source Array would not collapse, and the Feathered Heaven and Earth would not be easily discovered.

When the Void Source Array was fully operational, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

"The Void Gold Mountain will not be discovered, it belongs to me completely!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

-----------------

In the following days, Ye Tian entered the penance again and began to create an invincible ancestral technique.

He comprehended a lot of eternal rules, so it was not difficult to create an invincible ancestral technique, plus he had taken the Void Mi Golden Fruit, and his comprehension had improved a lot, so he had created an invincible ancestral technique in a short period of time.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian already possessed the Nine Invincible Ancestral Skills, and his cultivation had steadily improved a lot, and even the Wanyuan Guiru had been gradually perfected by Ye Tian to the peak realm of the third entry.

Originally, Ye Tian was going to retreat and cultivate all the time to raise the realm to the realm of a third-class invincible.

But this time, Tianfeng Hai gave a very important task.

What the content of the mission is, no one knows, and it suggests that this mission is extremely dangerous, and there is a great chance that it will fall, but the reward given is extremely rich, and even Ye Tian is moved.

A regular celestial thing!

That's the reward!

The value of the rule celestial objects is so high that it is enough for the saint-level forces to fight each other.

In order to comprehend the eternal rules, many invincible people need to spend tens of millions or even tens of millions of contribution points, so many invincible people to comprehend, you can imagine how high the value of a rule celestial object is.

To a certain extent, even the value of the Void Golden Fruit is far less than that of a regular celestial object.

But the Void Golden Fruit is rare, and the regular celestial objects are not so rare.

The value of the eternal source is high, but the Void Golden Fruit is not the Eternal Source, but a fruit born from the Eternal Source Void Gold Mountain, as long as there is enough time to wait, the Void Gold Mountain can give birth to countless Void Gold Fruits.

Therefore, what is truly priceless is the eternal source, not the regular celestial.

Moreover, for an individual, the value of the Void Golden Fruit is greater, and the value of the regular heavenly objects to a force is great.

Many of the invincible people in the Heavenly Wind Sea had a contribution value of far more than one billion, but they couldn't exchange it for the Void Golden Fruit, so they longed for the Void Golden Fruit even more.

However, comparatively speaking, although the value of the regular celestial objects is higher, the attraction to them is not as great as the Void Golden Fruit.

But Ye Tian wanted a rule celestial object even more, once he obtained a rule celestial object, even the most rubbish regular celestial object, if he brought it back to the Dark Forbidden Domain, many of the strongest people of the human race would be promoted to invincible in the future, and they would also have the opportunity to comprehend the eternal rules.

However, all the invincible people know very well that if they can make Tianfeng Hai pay a reward for a regular heavenly object, this mission is afraid that it is extremely dangerous, and ten thousand invincible people may not be able to live one invincible.

Moreover, this mission stipulates that no strong people above the third-class invincible are allowed to take this mission, and in the end, only fourth-class invincibles are allowed to take the mission.

In other words, Ye Tian meets the standards.

"Take the task!" Ye Tian immediately decided.

Anyway, his body is a copy of the body, even if it falls, the loss is not big, if he succeeds by luck, then he can get a regular heavenly object, with the strength of Tianfeng Hai, naturally he will not expect him to be an elite-level member.

After receiving the mission, Ye Tian was brought into a secret space by a third-class invincible.

Here, there are many other fourth-rank invincibles, who are obviously also elite members who have taken on this task.

As time passed, more and more invincibles took on this task.

Finally, on this day decades later, this mission issued by Tianfeng Hai disappeared, which also means that other invincible people can no longer take this mission.
